title: Stenness pie
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Stennes}}
[[File:Stenness_pie.jpg|thumb|250px|[[Huba]] steals a Stenness pie from the [[Pitareeze family]].]]
'''Stenness pie''' was a baked dessert. The [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] was programmed with a recipe for Stenness pie, which he gave to [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] during their tenure as employees of the [[Pitareeze family]]. According to C-3PO, the pie was a favorite food of the offworlders who took the [[Kalarba Safari]] tour. When the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Huba]] captured the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] duo, and later attempted to promote R2-D2 to the rank of [[Captain/Legends|captain]], the droids traded the Stenness pie recipe for their freedom.

==Appearances==
[[File:Stenness_pie2.jpg|thumb|150px|[[Meg Pitareeze]] bakes a Stenness pie.]]
*[[Droids (1994) 2|''Droids'' (1994) 2]]
*[[Droids (1995) 4|''Droids'' (1995) 4]]
